asset_name: Star Wars Droideka (Destroyer Droid) Low Poly
author: Rolling Droid Assets
usage_notes: Low-poly Droideka (Destroyer Droid) - rolling defensive droid with shield. Distinctive spherical/circular design. Metallic tan/brown color. Suitable for specialized CIS unit class with unique gameplay mechanics. Game-ready topology.
special_notes: Distinctive spherical shape - immediately recognizable Droideka
Compact form factor suggests defensive/mobile unit class
Metallic tan/brown coloring matches Separatist palette
Rolling silhouette suggests movement-based unit mechanics
Suitable for specialist unit tier or defensive doctrine
No skeleton rig - may require animation rig for rolling behavior

steps: Click the Download button (requires free Sketchfab account)
Select GLB format (recommended for Unity import)
Save as source_download.glb in this directory
Run: dotnet run --project src/Tools/PackCompiler -- ingest assets raw/sw_droideka_sketchfab_001
